appetizers.name: Authentic Nigerian Beef Suya
appetizers.description: Charcoal-grilled beef marinated in traditional Nigerian suya spices, slow-roasted to smoky perfection and served with a bold, spicy finish.

appetizers.name: Smoked Turkey Wings (Signature)
appetizers.description: Tender smoked turkey wings, glazed with our house BBQ sauce, served with a zesty herb dip and crispy onion crunch.

appetizers.name: Moi Moi Deluxe (Nigerian Style)
appetizers.description: Steamed Nigerian bean pudding made with fresh ground beans, peppers, and spices, served warm with a rich palm oil drizzle and a soft, silky texture.

main.name: Assorted (Nigerian) Jollof Rice Supreme
main.description: Aromatic long-grain rice cooked in a rich tomato-pepper blend, served with tender chicken, caramelized onions, and a hint of smoky spice.

main.name: Nigerian Pepper Soup (Chicken / Goat)
main.description: Hot and spicy broth infused with traditional Nigerian spices, served with tender meat and a refreshing kick of scent leaf.

main.name: Pounded Yam & Egusi
main.description: Smooth, stretchy pounded yam paired with a hearty egusi soup made from ground melon seeds, spinach, and tender beef, simmered in flavorful spices.

regional.name: Jamaican Ackee & Saltfish
regional.description: Jamaica’s national dish—salted fish sautéed with ackee, peppers, and spices for a flavorful breakfast or main.

regional.name: Kenyan Ugali & Sukuma Wiki
regional.description: Soft ugali served with sautéed kale, simmered in a rich tomato sauce and local spices for a comforting taste.

regional.name: Nigerian Bole & Fish
regional.description: Roasted plantain paired with grilled fish and spicy pepper sauce, finished with crunchy groundnuts and smoky aroma.

continental.name: Spanish Patatas Bravas
continental.description: Crispy golden potatoes served with spicy tomato sauce and creamy garlic aioli — the perfect shareable side.

continental.name: Italian Truffle Mushroom Risotto
continental.description: Creamy Arborio rice cooked with wild mushrooms, parmesan, and black truffle — luxurious and indulgent.

continental.name: Chinese Vegetable Chow Mein
continental.description: Stir-fried noodles with crunchy veggies in a light savory sauce — simple, delicious, and satisfying.

desserts.name: Chocolate Soufflé
desserts.description: Warm chocolate soufflé with vanilla bean ice cream and berry coulis

desserts.name: Crème Brûlée Trio
desserts.description: Vanilla, lavender, and chocolate crème brûlée with shortbread cookies

desserts.name: New York Cheesecake
desserts.description: Smooth and creamy cheesecake with a buttery biscuit base, finished with a light vanilla aroma.

breakfast.name: Yam & Egg Sauce
breakfast.description: Boiled yam served with rich tomato and pepper egg sauce, cooked in palm or vegetable oil.

breakfast.name: Fried Plantain & Scrambled Eggs
breakfast.description: Sweet fried plantain paired with fluffy scrambled eggs, seasoned to perfection.

breakfast.name: Artisan Grilled Chicken Sandwich
breakfast.description: Tender marinated chicken grilled to perfection, paired with fresh greens, ripe tomatoes, and a rich signature sauce on a warm brioche bun.

drinks.name: Bellare Wine
drinks.description: A smooth and elegant wine with delicate fruity notes and a clean, refreshing finish. Perfectly balanced for relaxed dining and special moments alike.

drinks.name: Moët & Chandon Champagne
drinks.description: An iconic French champagne celebrated for its vibrant elegance and refined bubbles. Crisp notes of green apple, citrus, and white peach blend seamlessly with a subtle brioche finish, making it perfect for celebrations and unforgettable moments.

drinks.name: Courvoisier
drinks.description: A distinguished French cognac known for its rich aroma and exceptionally smooth character. Notes of vanilla, toasted oak, and ripe fruit blend beautifully, delivering a refined finish that’s perfect for slow sipping or celebratory moments.

fastfood.name: Artisan Grilled Chicken Sandwich
fastfood.description: Tender marinated chicken grilled to perfection, paired with fresh greens, ripe tomatoes, and a rich signature sauce on a warm brioche bun

fastfood.name: Chicken Wings (Nigerian Style
fastfood.description: Crispy, juicy chicken wings tossed in a spicy pepper glaze with a side of cooling dip.

combos.name: Weekend Special
combos.description: 2 main dishes + 4 sides + 2 drinks.. A perfect feast for the weekend — a curated selection of our top dishes, served as a satisfying set meal. Enjoy premium flavors, generous portions, and a delicious experience designed for sharing with family and friends.

combos.name: Couple Combo
combos.description: 2 appetizers + 2 mains + 2 drinks.. A romantic meal for two — includes 2 appetizers, 2 main dishes, and 2 drinks. Perfect for date nights, anniversaries, or just a cozy dinner at Artisan Grills.

vegan.name: (Nigerian) Jollof Rice Supreme
vegan.description: Aromatic long-grain rice cooked in a rich tomato-pepper blend, served with tender chicken, caramelized onions, and a hint of smoky spice.

vegan.name: Plantain & Beans (Ewa Agoyin Style)
vegan.description: Soft cooked beans served with fried plantain and spicy pepper sauce.

kids.name: Kids Chicken Pie
kids.description: Flaky buttery crust filled with tender chicken, creamy veggies, and aromatic spices — a comfort classic with a gourmet twist.

kids.name: Rice & Stew
kids.description: Perfectly steamed rice served with rich, flavorful tomato stew and tender, slow-cooked meat — a hearty classic done right.
